text: Workflow 01 supports one delimited methylation upload that is parsed, normalized, validated, evaluated against the curated demo panel, and rendered with explicit limitations.
The canonical analytical columns are cpg_id and beta. Beta is numeric and constrained to the range from 0 to 1 before retained-row analysis.
Validation uses hard failures for missing required columns, non-numeric beta values, out-of-range beta values, and uploads where no valid analytical rows remain.
Mixed comma and tab delimiters are recorded as a warning when structure remains usable, but inconsistent row structure fails ingestion instead of partially retaining malformed rows.
Duplicate CpG handling is explicit: rows may be preserved and warned, rejected, or aggregated by mean beta only when optional metadata values do not conflict.
Structured interpretation is bounded to panel coverage and heuristic marker direction. Clinical claims are out of scope for Workflow 01.
The data directory policy allows only non-sensitive sample, de-identified, public demo, or small reference fixture files in git.
